logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.logger.correlationId, tracePoint: vars.logger.tracePoint, flow: vars.logger.flow, message : vars.logger.message default "", source : vars.logger.source default "", target : vars.logger.target default "", timeStamp : now(), additionalInfo : vars.logger.additionalInfo default "No additional Infomation available to log" }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.logger.correlationId, tracePoint: vars.logger.tracePoint, flow: vars.logger.flow, message : vars.logger.message default "", source : vars.logger.source default "", target : vars.logger.target default "", timeStamp : now(), additionalInfo : vars.logger.additionalInfo default "No additional Infomation available to log" }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.logger.correlationId, tracePoint: vars.logger.tracePoint, flow: vars.logger.flow, message : vars.logger.message default "", source : vars.logger.source default "", target : vars.logger.target default "", timeStamp : now(), additionalInfo : vars.logger.additionalInfo default "No additional Infomation available to log", (payload : payload) if(payload != "" and payload != null) }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.logger.correlationId, tracePoint: vars.logger.tracePoint, flow: vars.logger.flow, errorCode: vars.logger.errorCode, errorMessage : vars.logger.errorMessage default "", source : vars.logger.source default "", target : vars.logger.target default "", timeStamp : now(), additionalInfo : vars.logger.additionalInfo default "No additional Infomation available to log" }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : vars.logger.correlationId, tracePoint: vars.logger.tracePoint, flow: vars.logger.flow, message : vars.logger.message default "", source : vars.logger.source default "", target : vars.logger.target default "", timeStamp : now(), additionalInfo : vars.logger.additionalInfo default "No additional Infomation available to log" }]
